mapper.select:
SELECT m.*, c.category_name FROM med_medicine m LEFT JOIN med_category c ON m.category_id = c.id WHERE m.del_flag = 0
AND m.medicine_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.medicineName}, '%')
AND m.category_id = #{query.categoryId}
AND m.property = #{query.property}
AND m.meridian LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.meridian}, '%')
AND m.stock_quantity <= m.stock_alert_threshold
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC

SELECT c.category_name AS categoryName, COUNT(m.id) AS medicineCount, SUM(m.stock_quantity) AS totalStock FROM med_category c LEFT JOIN med_medicine m ON c.id = m.category_id AND m.del_flag = 0 WHERE c.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name ORDER BY medicineCount DESC
